headline: Why Philip Morris International (PM) Is Down 5.7% After Earnings Miss And Delisting Debt - And What's Next
summary: In recent weeks, Philip Morris International reported quarterly results showing revenue of US$10.36 billion, broadly in line with expectations, but adjusted operating income and EPS of US$1.69 came in slightly below analyst estimates. At the same time, the company’s removal of its 2.875% Notes due 2026 from the NYSE and institutional investors trimming positions have highlighted ongoing concerns about regulation, competition, and margin pressures in its shift toward smoke-free...

headline: Philip Morris International Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend of $1.47 Per Share
summary: STAMFORD, CT, March 05, 2026--Regulatory News: The Board of Directors of Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM) today declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.47 per common share, payable on April 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 19, 2026. The ex-dividend date is March 19, 2026. For more details on stock, dividends and other information, see www.pmi.com/dividend.
